description: The perfect way to complement your casual wear is to slip into these comfy sandals from catwalk. The cushioned footbed and adjustable midfoot strap ensures maximum comfort, while the TPU outsole lends traction to every step you take. Upper Suede straps with a toe separator to lock the foot in place Buckle-adjustable midfoot strap to offer a customised Fit Cushioned footbed with ergonomically raised nubs for all-day comfort Slightly padded heel for enhanced comfort Outsole Lightweight durable TPU outsole with multi-directional grooves for absolute grip and traction Slipper care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
